data.title: TrialClinIQ Raises $150K from Caduceus Capital, Joins LAUNCH Accelerator, and Opens $1.5M Round to Transform Clinical Trial Access
data.description: A clinical trial recruitment platform, TrialClinIQ, based in Houston, Texas, disclosed a pre-seed investment of $150K from Caduceus Capital Partners and its acceptance into the Caduceus LAUNCH digital health accelerator. Founded by board-certified neurologist Jontel Pierce, MD, the company aims to enhance health equity by revolutionizing the patient matching process for clinical trials. Additionally, TrialClinIQ has initiated a funding round of $1.5M to expedite its growth and impact in the healthcare industry.

data.title: Rein Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $50 Million Underwritten Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Announced in Austin, Texas on April 30, 2026, Rein Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNTX) disclosed the pricing details of its public offering. The company is focusing on orphan pulmonary and fibrosis medications. The offering involved selling fifty million shares of common stock at $1.00 per share, amassing $50 million in total proceeds before deductions. Additionally, underwriters have the option to acquire up to 7.5 million more shares within 45 days at the same price. The closing of the offering is anticipated around May 4, 2026, pending standard conditions. Notably, the offering solely comprised common stock without any warrants.

data.title: Frontera Announces Annual General Meeting Results
data.description: Calgary, Alberta - On April 30, 2026, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) shared the outcomes of its annual general meeting of shareholders for 2026. The meeting saw the election of new directors.
